content: The music of Headgear saw increasing public exposure due to plays on the popular Mystery Train radio show on RTÉ Radio 1 , including a live set, and appearances on The View on RTÉ television
summary: The music of Headgear saw increasing public exposure due to plays on the popular Mystery Train radio show on RTÉ Radio 1 , including a live set, and appearances on The View on RTÉ television
